name: Flickering Relay Node
visual_description: A crystalline metallic node suspended in mid-air, crackling with unstable arcs of energy. Its surface is scarred and pitted, with visible cracks leaking faint luminescence. Wisps of electromagnetic distortion shimmer around it, creating a faint humming aura. The background fades to neutral grey, keeping focus on the malfunctioning device's chaotic energy discharge.
full_prompt: A crystalline metallic node suspended in mid-air, crackling with unstable arcs of energy. Its surface is scarred and pitted, with visible cracks leaking faint luminescence. Wisps of electromagnetic distortion shimmer around it, creating a faint humming aura. The background fades to neutral grey, keeping focus on the malfunctioning device's chaotic energy discharge.. Stylized digital illustration, centered object-focused composition, self-illuminated subject against dark background, ancient technology aesthetic.
